title: Punishment for Cheating by Personation using Computer Resource
description: Whoever by means of any communication device or computer resource cheats by personation (e.g. fake caller, impersonating bank official, fake social media profile, phishing scam).
punishment: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to 3 years and fine up to 1 lakh rupees.

title: Punishment for Identity Theft
description: Whoever fraudulently or dishonestly makes use of the electronic signature, password or any other unique identification feature of any other person.
punishment: Imprisonment of either description for a term which may extend to 3 years and fine up to 1 lakh rupees.

title: Punishment for Violation of Privacy
description: Whoever intentionally or knowingly captures, publishes or transmits the image of a private area of any person without consent, under circumstances violating privacy.
punishment: Imprisonment up to 3 years or fine up to 2 lakh rupees, or both.

act: National Cyber Crime Reporting Helpline (Govt of India)
title: Cyber Financial Fraud Immediate Action Procedure
description: For financial cyber fraud, dial national helpline 1930 immediately within the 'Golden Hour' (first 2 to 3 hours). Reporting promptly enables law enforcement and nodal bank officers to block fraudulent transactions and freeze funds in beneficiary bank accounts before withdrawal.
punishment: Immediate administrative lien/freeze on defrauded funds across banking channels.
